case_title: TCF EQUIPMENT FINANCE, A DIVISION OF TCF NATIONAL VS. CUONG T. DO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RICE VALLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TCF EQUIPMENT FINANCE, A DIVISION OF TCF NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUONG T. DO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RICE VALLEY $15,379.79 PRINCIPAL, $1,875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $10,359.74 INTEREST, $613.71 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,228.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100186602)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100149050) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TCF EQUIPMENT FINANCE, A DIVISION OF TCF NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG T. DO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RICE VALLEY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2022
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $613.71 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100186602) AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG T. DO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RICE VALLEY

DECLARATION OF COST- CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100186602) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TCF EQUIPMENT FINANCE, A DIVISION OF TCF NATIONAL BANK
